reason: This is a standard religious tweet about prayer times in Jeddah, quoting a common Quranic verse about maintaining prayers. Contains no extremist content or ISIS-specific messaging.
original_post: صلاة العصر حسب توقيت #جدة (حَافِظُوا عَلَى الصَّلَوَاتِ وَالصَّلاةِ الوُسْطَى وَقُومُوا لِلَّهِ قَانِتِينَ (238) البقرة)
